name: Chatwoot
description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer engagement platform that provides live chat, email, and social media support channels. The API lets you manage conversations, contacts, messages, and agents programmatically across all connected channels.

capabilities.name: list_conversations
capabilities.description: List and filter conversations across all inboxes with pagination, status filters, and assignee filters.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a message to an existing conversation as an agent, bot, or on behalf of a contact.

capabilities.name: create_contact
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with name, email, phone number, and custom attributes for customer tracking.

capabilities.name: search_contacts
capabilities.description: Search for contacts by name, email, phone number, or custom attributes across the account.

capabilities.name: assign_conversation
capabilities.description: Assign or reassign a conversation to a specific agent or team for handling.

capabilities.name: update_conversation_status
capabilities.description: Change the status of a conversation to open, resolved, pending, or snoozed.
